The Sheet Portal

The Sheet Portal is a useful place you can go. It shows all of the tags for your bots.

You can use it to edit your bots, add tags, make bots, and delete bots.

It can be opened to show the tags for one bot OR for all of the bots in a dimension (we're about to learn about those).

Outer Space

This part is kind of crazy!

It takes you to a different dimension called "outerSpace"

Dimensions can have any name you want. Each dimension can have a different collection of bots in it.

This tutorial is programmed to make everything look different when you enter the outerSpace dimension

Going to Dimensions

You can go to any dimension you want with the os.goToDimension() command.

Just make sure you put the name of the dimension you want to go to inside quotation marks. For example: os.goToDimension("outerSpace")

When you go to a new dimension, you will only see bots with the tag that matches the dimension's name.

For example, if you go to the scale dimension, you will only see bots with something in their #scale tag.

During this tutorial, if you go to a different dimension, there will always be a button in the top left to take you back to the home dimension.

ab-1

ab-1 is a set of bots that are automatically loaded into CasualOS to make your life easier

You can summon ab-1 by double-clicking on an empty space in the Grid Portal.

There are lots of things ab-1 can do. If you want to explore all of them, try the following:

  • Click on ab-1 after it's summoned
  • Click & drag from ab-1 to select a bot
  • Use ab-1 to select an empty space
  • Use ab-1 to select ab-1
